artifact.content_preview:
From: dave.chen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
To: alice.tran@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Cc: carol.nguyen@ssc-spc.gc.ca
Subject: Opportunity: Wi-Fi Infrastructure Upgrade During Network Migration
Date: March 7, 2026

Alice, Carol,

While reviewing the network migration plan for Site A, I wanted to flag
an opportunity that I think we should discuss with the steering committee.

Given that our contractors will already be on-site and the network
infrastructure will be partially disrupted during the Catalyst 9500
switch deployme

extracted_tasks.text: Discuss Wi-Fi infrastructure upgrade opportunity with the steering committee
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: I wanted to flag an opportunity that I think we should discuss with the steering committee.

extracted_tasks.text: Upgrade Wi-Fi access points to Catalyst 9120 series across Sites A, B, and C
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Upgrading to the Catalyst 9120 series during the same migration window would avoid a separate disruptive maintenance activity

extracted_tasks.text: Obtain steering committee approval for the expanded scope and budget
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: Could we add this to the scope and get steering committee approval before the March 18 window?

extracted_tasks.text: Decision: Use the Catalyst 9500 switch deployment window for concurrent infrastructure upgrades
extracted_tasks.source_excerpt: this would be an ideal time to also upgrade the Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities.

metadata.subject: Opportunity: Wi-Fi Infrastructure Upgrade During Network Migration

alerts.detected_ask: Upgrade the Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities from Cisco Aironet 2800 to Catalyst 9120 series.
alerts.baseline_reference: IN SCOPE: Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites.
alerts.suggested_action: Reject the request as an informal addition. Instruct the requester to submit a formal Change Request (CR) through the SSC Project Change Management Process to evaluate the $110k budget impact and the 9-day schedule delay against the April 30 Go-Live constraint.

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "in_scope": [
    "Decommissioning of Sites B and C physical infrastructure",
    "Migration of all server workloads from Sites B and C to Site A",
    "Physical server rack consolidation and cable management at Site A",
    "Environmental systems (HVAC, UPS, fire suppression) optimization at Site A",
    "Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites",
    "Network segmentation reconfiguration per updated security zones",
    "BGP routing table migration and validation",
    "Network performance baseline testing post-migration",
    "Migration of all on-premise Active Directory domain controllers to Site A",
    "AD schema extension and forest restructuring",
    "Group Policy Object (GPO) consolidation and testing",
    "Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD",
    "Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office",
    "Monthly steering committee presentations",
    "Risk register maintenance",
    "Change management and stakeholder communications"
  ],
  "out_of_scope": [
    "End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)",
    "Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)",
    "GC-Cloud workload migration (AWS, Azure, GC-Cloud)",
    "End-user training and change management beyond project communications",
    "Procurement of new application licenses",
    "Network monitoring tool upgrades"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "D-001: Project Management Plan",
    "D-002: Technical Design Document (TDD)",
    "D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package",
    "D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)",
    "D-005: User Acceptance Test (UAT) Plan",
    "D-006: Site A Consolidation Complete (Go-Live)",
    "D-007: Post-Migration Validation Report",
    "D-008: Project Closure Report"
  ],
  "constraints": [
    "Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes",
    "Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026",
    "Final project closure date of June 30, 2026",
    "Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management",
    "Compliance with Government of Canada Cloud Adoption Strategy",
    "Compliance with Treasury Board Policy on Government Security",
    "Compliance with Privacy Act (R.S.C., 1985, c. P-21)",
    "Compliance with Official Languages Act for all client-facing deliverables",
    "Adherence to SSC Project Change Management Process for scope, schedule, or budget changes"
  ]
}
```

Integration testing with downstream applications dependent on AD
Weekly status reports to SSC Project Management Office
out_of_scope: End-user device refresh or replacement (laptops, desktops, mobile devices)
Application modernization or re-platforming (lift and shift only)
End-user training and change management beyond project communications
deliverables: D-003: Security Assessment and Authorization (SA&A) Package
D-004: Migration Runbook (Sites B and C)
constraints: Total approved budget of $2,400,000 inclusive of all fees and taxes
Go-Live (D-006) must be achieved no later than April 30, 2026
Final project closure date of June 30, 2026
Compliance with ITSG-33: IT Security Risk Management

llm_calls.content:
```json
{
  "alignment_score": 0.3,
  "drift_type": "scope_expansion",
  "detected_ask": "Upgrade the Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities from Cisco Aironet 2800 to Catalyst 9120 series.",
  "baseline_reference": "IN SCOPE: Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites.",
  "suggested_action": "Reject the request as an informal addition. Instruct the requester to submit a formal Change Request (CR) through the SSC Project Change Management Process to evaluate the $110k budget impact and the 9-day schedule delay against the April 30 Go-Live constraint.",
  "reasoning": "While the baseline includes Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches (core/distribution), it does not include wireless access points (edge). This request introduces new hardware procurement and installation tasks. Furthermore, the estimated 9-day delay and $110,000 cost directly impact the project's fixed constraints (April 30 Go-Live and $2.4M budget), qualifying it as scope expansion rather than a clarification."
}
```

parsed_json.detected_ask: Upgrade the Wi-Fi access points across all three data centre facilities from Cisco Aironet 2800 to Catalyst 9120 series.
parsed_json.baseline_reference: IN SCOPE: Replacement and deployment of Cisco Catalyst 9500 series switches across all three sites.
parsed_json.suggested_action: Reject the request as an informal addition. Instruct the requester to submit a formal Change Request (CR) through the SSC Project Change Management Process to evaluate the $110k budget impact and the 9-day schedule delay against the April 30 Go-Live constraint.
parsed_json.reasoning: While the baseline includes Cisco Catalyst 9500 switches (core/distribution), it does not include wireless access points (edge). This request introduces new hardware procurement and installation tasks. Furthermore, the estimated 9-day delay and $110,000 cost directly impact the project's fixed constraints (April 30 Go-Live and $2.4M budget), qualifying it as scope expansion rather than a clarification.
